clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content:
I understand your frustration, but we need to be clear about our scope of work. We were contracted to manage your ad campaigns and provide the CRM system so we could qualify the incoming leads. We delivered exactly that.

The actual process of qualifying, following up, and closing those leads falls entirely on your end. If there was an issue with your internal sales process, that is outside our control.

Since you have stated you will no longer fund the ad account, what exactly are you expecting from us moving forward?
